_instructions: Fill in every field below then open this folder in Claude Code. Claude will read this file and generate all project documents into project-docs/. Delete this _instructions key when done.

project.name: My Project
project.description: A short description of what this product does and who it is for.

domain: e.g. healthtech | fintech | edtech | logistics | e-commerce | proptech | legaltech

personas.name: Admin
personas.description: Manages the platform, configures tenants, handles user access.

personas.name: End User
personas.description: The primary consumer of the product's core features.

flows.name: User Signup
flows.description: New user registers, verifies email, and completes onboarding.

flows.name: Core Action
flows.description: The primary value-delivering action a user takes in the product.

flows.name: Admin Management
flows.description: Admin views, configures, and manages the platform settings.

stack.backend: e.g. Node.js | Python | Go | Java | Ruby | .NET
stack.frontend: e.g. React | Vue | Angular | Next.js | Svelte
stack.mobile: e.g. React Native | Flutter | Swift | Kotlin — or leave empty
stack.database: e.g. PostgreSQL | MySQL | MongoDB | DynamoDB | Supabase
stack.infra: e.g. Terraform | Pulumi | CDK — or leave empty
stack.containerisation: e.g. Docker | Kubernetes | ECS | Fargate — or leave empty

compliance: e.g. HIPAA | GDPR | SOC2 | PCI-DSS — or none
